queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of maintaining a critical account or managing other existing credits on consumer default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how a negative checking account balance serves as a significant driver of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the correlation between the absence of a checking account and increased loan default probability.
